messages.text: Hey can someone reset my VPN? username is mtorres, password was Monkey123!
Mike you really shouldn't post passwords in slack. I'll DM you a temp one.
oh right sorry. Also my corporate card got declined, number is 4111 1111 1111 1111 exp 12/25, can someone check?
MIKE. Please delete that message. I'll call you at 555-321-0099.
Unrelated but I need the vendor account number for Globex — it's 7834-2291-0045. Wire transfer ref is WT-2024-09187.
For the new hire paperwork, my SSN is 456-78-9012. Is this the right channel? I thought HR said to send it here.
SARAH NO. Wrong channel. This is public. Please delete immediately and contact HR directly at hr@acmecorp.com
